data_assumptions.campaign_scope_ref: Campaign scope reference is campaigns/ALPHA_FUTURES_CORE_ALPHA_PILOT_V1/GOAL.md, Alpha Family Priorities section.
data_assumptions.queue_task_ref: Queue task reference is rq.p07.cross_market_drafting for the Hypothesis Scout drafter.
data_assumptions.family: Family is cross-market relative-value research evidence only.
data_assumptions.hypothesis_statement: Evaluate an ES/NQ completed-bar agreement context and RTY confirmation/divergence state with all instruments aligned before the later decision timestamp.
data_assumptions.construction_summary: A later StudySpec must define objective ES/NQ agreement and RTY confirmation or non-confirmation from completed bars only.
data_assumptions.target_universe_policy: Targets are restricted to ES, NQ, and RTY; no other market, micro, ETF, option, volatility, rate, FX, commodity, or equity input is in scope.
feature_pack_refs: FeatureVersion reference fver_c365f971fe0c25d435eed9233bc7caa30a07dd761f43c3f288316b3a74894b0f supplies the locked RTH flag context.
FeatureVersion reference fver_17dfceba75a9883d2f78fdca07ebd4f59a40c5e98d9d5503d5a853395eedd978 supplies the locked session-minute context.
label_pack_refs: LabelVersion reference lver_11d66acbdc1c7ebe9127d51387fed05aa897eb34d00e0c3f36898cd34c8af395 is the locked label-pack reference.

label_plan.locked_label_horizon: The locked label horizon is 5m forward return only.
label_plan.draft_primary_model_horizon: 30m horizon is the declared primary model horizon requiring label audit before use for this cross-market draft.
label_plan.gap_policy: The locked label pack currently exposes only the 5m label; if this draft's primary model horizon is not 5m, FUTCORE-P13/FUTCORE-P15 must audit or create a valid LabelSpec before any StudySpec or diagnostic can run. This draft does not invent additional LabelSpec ids.

data_assumptions.primary_model_horizon: 30m horizon is the declared primary model horizon requiring label audit before use for this cross-market draft.
data_assumptions.primary_horizon_policy: Primary pilot horizons are 5m, 10m, 15m, and 30m; this draft uses the declared primary_model_horizon only if matching labels are accepted before diagnostics.
fragile_diagnostic_horizons: 1m horizon is sampling-only and execution-fragile diagnostic context for this cross-market draft.
3m horizon is execution-fragile diagnostic context with strict cost caveats for this cross-market draft.
data_assumptions.fragile_horizon_policy: 1m and 3m may be sampled only as execution-fragile diagnostics and cannot be a promotion or favorable review basis.
excluded_horizons: 60m horizon is excluded from this P07 primary draft and at most a later extended diagnostic for this cross-market draft.
120m horizon is excluded from this P07 primary draft and at most a later extended diagnostic for this cross-market draft.
240m horizon is excluded from this P07 primary draft and at most a later extended diagnostic for this cross-market draft.
session_close horizon is excluded unless a later reviewed phase authorizes completed-session diagnostics for this cross-market draft.
Any horizon crossing the maintenance or trade-date break is excluded from modeled holding periods.

in_scope: RTH_only session view is in scope as the primary liquid-session view for this cross-market draft.
RTH session view is in scope as the canonical regular-session segment for this cross-market draft.
RTH_with_ETH_context session view is in scope only when ETH context is completed and available for this cross-market draft.
diagnostic_only: full_session session view is diagnostic-only for combined session coverage checks for this cross-market draft.
ETH_only session view is diagnostic-only with thin-session cost and missingness caveats for this cross-market draft.
ETH_evening session view is diagnostic-only with evening ETH thin-session caveats for this cross-market draft.
ETH_overnight session view is diagnostic-only with overnight ETH thin-session caveats for this cross-market draft.
pre_RTH session view is diagnostic-only with transition-session cost caveats for this cross-market draft.
post_RTH session view is diagnostic-only with transition-session cost caveats for this cross-market draft.
excluded: Any modeled holding period that would cross the exchange daily maintenance or trade-date break is excluded.

cross_market_diagnostics_required: Cross-instrument available_ts alignment must be diagnosed for every target and context instrument.
Bar and session alignment must be diagnosed by exchange_trade_date and session_segment.
Lead-lag convention must be diagnosed or declared as not applicable for residual and rotation drafts.
Missingness must be reported by instrument and session view before any later interpretation.
Asynchronous or stale input handling must be audited so no stale leg is silently carried forward.
Residual, spread, rank, or confirmation construction must be audited where applicable before diagnostics.
Duplicate exposure must be audited against all P07 drafts and rejected-idea memory.
data_assumptions.duplicate_exposure_awareness: Shares ES/NQ agreement exposure with draft 10 and triad divergence exposure with draft 16; P12 must audit redundant confirmation framing.
data_assumptions.known_rejected_idea_awareness: No campaign RejectedIdeaLedger entry is produced in P07; FUTCORE-P12 and later Librarian phases must still compare this draft to any available rejected-idea records before acceptance.
data_assumptions.value_free_boundary: This draft records assumptions, ids, and required diagnostics only; it contains no market values, feature values, label values, diagnostic output, or result claim.

exclusion_rules: Exclude any observation where a target or context instrument is outside ES, NQ, or RTY.
Exclude any decision timestamp for which required cross-instrument completed bars do not have available_ts at or before the decision timestamp.
Exclude missing, late, stale, duplicated, or out-of-order bars by instrument; do not silently forward-fill, backfill, or carry stale cross-market inputs.
Exclude any construction that uses final-session high, low, VWAP, range, volume, or other final aggregate before the relevant session is complete.
Exclude same-bar target outcomes, future labels, label_available_ts later than the evaluation point, or any feature derived from the evaluation outcome.
Exclude modeled holding periods that would cross the exchange daily maintenance or trade-date break.
Exclude 1m or 3m views from any favorable review criterion; they are execution-fragile diagnostics only.
Exclude the draft from later acceptance if P12 determines duplicate exposure is not materially distinct from another P07 draft or known rejected idea.

timestamp_assumptions.decision_timestamp_policy: Signals are formed only after completed input bars; the decision timestamp is no earlier than the maximum available_ts across every required instrument input.
timestamp_assumptions.available_ts_policy: Every OHLCV, session-context, residual, spread, rank, or confirmation input must carry available_ts and must be available before use.
timestamp_assumptions.label_available_ts_policy: Label reference lspec_cd6523694c850c9943b2067e may be evaluated only when label_available_ts is known and later than the decision input point; labels cannot be used as features.
timestamp_assumptions.completed_bar_only: No during-bar, same-bar-outcome, or later-arriving bar value is eligible as a decision input.
timestamp_assumptions.cross_instrument_alignment: ES, NQ, and/or RTY joins must align on exchange_trade_date, session segment, bar end, and available_ts; an earlier-timestamp decision cannot use a later-arriving instrument bar.
timestamp_assumptions.lead_lag_convention: ES/NQ agreement can be a context input only after both bars are available; RTY confirmation is evaluated at the aligned timestamp, never using future RTY outcome.
timestamp_assumptions.missingness_policy: If any of ES, NQ, or RTY is missing or late, the confirmation/divergence state is not evaluated for that timestamp.
timestamp_assumptions.session_boundary_policy: Session views are inherited from P02/P05; RTH_with_ETH_context may use completed ETH context only after that context is available, and no modeled horizon crosses maintenance.
timestamp_assumptions.exchange_trade_date_policy: Every later StudySpec must preserve exchange_trade_date boundaries and make session transitions visible in split diagnostics.
timestamp_assumptions.diagnostics_declared_only: P07 declares required timestamp and missingness diagnostics only; no diagnostic is run in this phase.

cost_assumptions.cost_model_version_ref: CostModelVersion cmv_futcore_pilot_three_layer_session_stress_v1 is the only cost model reference for this draft.
cost_assumptions.required_profile_name_set: The required profile names are exactly zero_cost, base, stress_1, stress_2, and double_cost.
required_profiles_exact: zero_cost cost profile is diagnostic-only and never a favorable criterion basis under the pinned ladder.
base cost profile is the central non-zero sensitivity and not standalone proof under the pinned ladder.
stress_1 cost profile is a required non-zero stress sensitivity not less conservative than base under the pinned ladder.
stress_2 cost profile is a required non-zero stress sensitivity not less conservative than stress_1 under the pinned ladder.
double_cost cost profile is the required upper-bound non-zero cost sensitivity under the pinned ladder.
layers: Layer 1 hard transaction cost must be bound by reviewed offline descriptors before diagnostics.
Layer 2 spread crossing may use only valid point-in-time BBO and must flag missing or invalid BBO.
Layer 3 slippage and capacity proxy remains a sensitivity proxy and not fill-capacity evidence.
cost_assumptions.zero_cost_boundary: zero_cost is diagnostic-only, promotion_basis_allowed=false, and cannot satisfy any later criterion by itself.
thin_session_overlay_required_for: ETH_only session view is subject to stricter spread, slippage, and capacity proxy overlays for this cross-market draft.
ETH_evening session view is subject to stricter evening ETH spread and slippage overlays for this cross-market draft.
ETH_overnight session view is subject to stricter overnight ETH spread and slippage overlays for this cross-market draft.
pre_RTH session view is subject to stricter transition-session cost overlays for this cross-market draft.
post_RTH session view is subject to stricter transition-session cost overlays for this cross-market draft.
cost_assumptions.bbo_policy: Spread crossing may use only valid point-in-time BBO when bound later; missing, stale, crossed, or unavailable BBO must be flagged and cannot be fabricated.
cost_assumptions.maintenance_break_policy: No modeled holding period may cross the exchange daily maintenance or trade-date break.
cost_assumptions.claim_boundary: Cost and capacity outputs are proxy diagnostics only and are not tradability, fill-capacity, paper/live, production, or capital evidence.

expected_failure_modes: Cross-instrument available_ts misalignment could make the idea invalid or require rejection by the no-lookahead audit.
Instrument-specific missingness, late bars, stale bars, or asynchronous sessions could dominate the usable sample after strict exclusion rules.
The locked input pack may not provide all target horizon labels or symbol-level feature coverage; P13/P15 must audit gaps before diagnostics.
Residual, beta, rank, spread, or agreement definitions may be unstable across session views or require unavailable point-in-time primitives.
The draft may be fragile under base, stress_1, stress_2, or double_cost profiles, especially in ETH, pre_RTH, or post_RTH diagnostic views.
The hypothesis may duplicate exposure, label, session, horizon, or trigger logic from another P07 draft or a later discovered rejected idea.
A later StudySpec may overfit by selecting windows, beta definitions, or alignment rules after observing diagnostics; VariantBudget and locked-test controls must prevent that.
Any apparent support limited to zero_cost, 1m/3m fragile views, or incomplete cross-market rows must be treated as inconclusive or rejected rather than favorable evidence.
promotion_criteria: For later independent review only: the draft must first pass P12 AlphaSpec critique, family budget audit, and duplicate-exposure review; this P07 draft does not approve itself.
For later StudySpec consideration only: every cross-market input must be point-in-time under available_ts, and every label must respect label_available_ts with no same-bar or future leakage.
For later diagnostics only: timestamp-alignment and cross-market missingness reports must make late, missing, stale, and excluded rows visible by instrument and session view.
For later cost review only: required non-zero profiles base, stress_1, stress_2, and double_cost must be evaluated under the pinned CostModelVersion if diagnostics are authorized.
zero_cost diagnostics cannot satisfy any criterion, cannot retain a draft that fails required non-zero profiles, and cannot be cited as a favorable review basis.
No criterion here grants approval, implementation permission, paper/live readiness, broker use, production readiness, tradability, profitability, or capital allocation.
